title: When Xi Jinping meets Joe Biden
description: Thaw in US-China relations would calm economic and political nerves in world capitals. Delhi too would be relieved
keywords: Joe Biden, Xi Jinping, G20 Summit, US China ties, US China relations, donald trump, Indian express, Opinion, Editorial, Current Affairs
snippet: Asia has reasons to welcome the first face-to-face summit between the US President Joe Biden and the Chinese leader Xi Jinping on the margins of the G-20 summit...
